The correct answer is **D. John Green**, who is the author of *The Fault in Our Stars*, a widely popular young adult novel. This book was published in 2012 and became a bestseller, later adapted into a critically acclaimed film. Stephenie Meyer (*Twilight*), Suzanne Collins (*The Hunger Games*), and Stephen Chbosky (*The Perks of Being a Wallflower*) are also well-known YA authors but wrote different works.
